message:
feat(network): add DHCPServer types and constructor

Add new network package with DHCPServer for managing dnsmasq-based DHCP.
Includes DHCPConfig struct with required fields (Bridge, Gateway, RangeStart,
RangeEnd, Netmask, LeaseTime) and optional DNS field. Constructor validates
required fields and sets up paths for dnsmasq config, leases, and log files.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
